blockingIssues.description: src/flow/windowMaximized.ts still captures Window.getCurrent() once at actor creation time and reuses maximize actors indefinitely from a module-level map keyed only by label, so reopening a window under the same label can inherit stale ownership bound to a disposed native window.

src/flow/windowFocus.ts still keeps a never-evicted label-keyed focus actor cache with no teardown or refresh semantics for close/reopen cycles, so the fix feature does not encode the required same-label reopen freshness contract.
tests/window_ownership.logic.test.ts still lacks same-label close/reopen coverage, so VAL-CONTROLS-007 and VAL-CROSS-004 remain unverified for the reported failure mode.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a mission-library note that any per-window cache keyed only by label must define teardown/recreation semantics for close-reopen cycles because Tauri can reuse labels like main-1.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected again because the current rerun confirms the issue remains unresolved in one feature family, but that is still insufficient evidence to promote a new durable knowledge entry without a successful fix demonstrating the intended pattern.
